name: Place order with invalid petId returns client error
scenarioId: store_negative:Place order with invalid petId returns client error
methodName: Place order with invalid petId returns client error

testSteps.description: 1: Place order with invalid petId returns client error ({petId=-1})

children.description: Given I have a store order payload for petId -1 with quantity 1, status "placed" and complete true
When I send POST request to place store order
Then store negative response status should be 400 or 200

testSteps.description: 2: Place order with invalid petId returns client error ({petId=999999999999})

children.description: Given I have a store order payload for petId 999999999999 with quantity 1, status "placed" and complete true
When I send POST request to place store order
Then store negative response status should be 400 or 200

title: Place order with invalid petId returns client error

dataTable.scenarioOutline:
Given I have a store order payload for petId <petId> with quantity 1, status "placed" and complete true
When I send POST request to place store order
Then store negative response status should be 400 or 200
